name: Trenette with Pesto, Potatoes and Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons freshly grated pecorino romano cheese
2 medium russet potatoes, peeled and cut into
6 ounces green beans, trimmed and cut into
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely grind basil, olive oil, 6 tablespoons each grated pecorino and parmesan cheeses, toasted pine nuts, and minced garlic in a processor. Season the pesto to taste with salt and pepper.
- Pesto can be prepared up to 2 days ahead. Press plastic wrap onto the surface of the pesto and refrigerate.
2. Cook potatoes in a large pot of boiling salted water until just tender, about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer potatoes to a large bowl. Add green beans to the same pot and cook until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to the bowl with potatoes.
3. Cook pasta in the same pot until tender but still firm to bite. Drain, reserving 1/2 cup of cooking liquid. Transfer pasta to the bowl with potatoes and green beans.
4. Whisk reserved 1/2 cup cooking liquid into pesto. Add pesto to the pasta mixture and toss thoroughly to coat. Transfer pasta to a large platter. Serve, passing additional grated pecorano romano cheese separately.
